entities.name: CHICKPEA

entities.description: The country where the study on chickpea marketing is conducted

entities.description: A niche market form of chickpea sold in its pods

entities.description: A specialized market segment for specific products like Green Pod Chickpea

entities.description: The primary producers of chickpea in Ethiopia

entities.name: DESCRIPTIVE METHODS
entities.description: Statistical methods used to analyze the collected data

entities.description: Statistical methods used to analyze the factors affecting GPCP trading

entities.description: A localized variety of chickpea favored in the GPCP market

entities.description: An improved variety of chickpea favored in the GPCP market

entities.name: TASTE
entities.description: A quality attribute that makes certain chickpea varieties favorable to consumers

entities.description: A physical attribute considered by market actors for GPCP buying decisions

entities.description: A physical attribute considered by market actors for GPCP buying decisions

entities.name: DESI

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: A type or variety of chickpea

entities.name: PROXIMITY TO MARKET
entities.description: The distance from the farm to the market, affecting the amount of GPCP traded

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: A demographic factor affecting the amount of GPCP traded

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD STATUS
entities.description: A socio-economic factor affecting the amount of GPCP traded

entities.description: A demographic factor affecting the amount of GPCP traded

entities.name: HARVESTING AND POST-HARVESTING COSTS
entities.description: Economic costs that affect the amount of GPCP traded

entities.name: PRICE GAP
entities.description: The difference in price between grain and GPCP that affects trading amounts

entities.name: ACCESS TO FINANCE
entities.description: The availability of financial resources affecting the amount of GPCP traded

entities.description: A financial shortage that motivates some farmers to sell GPCP

entities.description: An economic goal that motivates market-oriented farmers to exploit the niche market

entities.name: GRAIN MARKET
entities.description: The traditional market for chickpea sold in grain form

entities.description: Processes used to increase the market value of GPCP products
